spec_context.ambiguity_note: Excitation described as 'machine vibration near resonance' without a single target frequency.
Acceleration level given as 1.0 without unit (g, m/s², or mm/s²).
Piezoelectric material listed as 'PZT' without grade specification (5A vs 5H differ by ~60% in d31).
Load resistance described as 'connected electrical load' without specifying a fixed value or variable range.
spec_context.load_note: An electrical load is connected but its fixed value or variable role is not specified.

spec_context.ambiguity_note: Operating condition described as 'low-frequency industrial vibration' without a target frequency value.
Operating frequency specified as 45-55 Hz; resonance can be tuned within this window.
Damping ratio not specified; standard 1% mechanical damping assumed unless specified otherwise.
Piezoelectric material specified as PZT-5A; full material constants follow standard IEEE values.
Excitation frequency described as 'tuned to resonance'; design is evaluated at its resonant frequency.
Tip mass is 'preferably light'; this is a soft preference, not a hard constraint.
